text: Contractor will use multiple consultants on the project, including but not limited to the Architect, Structural Engineer, Civil Engineer, ADA/FHA consultant, Waterproofing consultant, Acoustical consultant,  QA/QC  consultant,  etc.  The  consultants  will  issue  reports  during  the  course  of construction, typically on a monthly basis. The Subcontractor is responsible to correct all 'open' items from any and all of the consultant reports that are related to their scope of work.
